fields.label: From State
fields.description: Workflow state before the decision was taken.

fields.label: Action
fields.description: Action recorded in the workflow transition.

fields.label: To State
fields.description: Workflow state after the decision was applied.

fields.label: Actor
fields.description: User who performed the workflow action.

fields.label: Acted On
fields.description: Timestamp when the action was taken.

fields.label: Comment
fields.description: Comment captured with the workflow transition.
